title: Rough Terrain Vehicle Using Rocker-Bogie Mechanism
description: 6-wheel rocker-bogie rover with passive differential suspension traversing obstacles up to 2× wheel diameter (50 mm), each wheel independently driven by DC gear motor, Arduino Mega controller.
objective: Traverse 50 mm obstacles; 6-wheel independent drive; autonomous obstacle detection via ultrasonic; 2 h runtime on LiPo.
constraints: 12 V LiPo; 6× DC gear motors; Arduino Mega; BOM < ₹5000; 25 cm wheel diameter.
design_element_titles: DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control
L298N Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver Module

element_usage_notes.Rocker-Bogie Rough-Terrain Drive System: 3 motors per side; differential bar equalises pitch on uneven terrain.
element_usage_notes.HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Obstacle-Distance Sen: Forward-facing; triggers avoidance manoeuvre when obstacle < 30 cm.
